Discover
Our Story

A house built on patience and precision.

ZIAD Jewellery is built on a single belief: that jewellery should outlast trends. That belief guides every piece we make — from the first sketch to the final polish.

We work only with responsibly sourced gold and independently certified diamonds and gemstones. Every setting is checked by hand, because a piece worn for a lifetime deserves nothing less.

From the moment you reach out — in our showroom or on WhatsApp — you are guided by a personal advisor, not a salesperson. That is the ZIAD experience.

Why ZIAD

Reasons to trust us with the moments that matter

Premium Quality

Solid gold, certified diamonds, and finishing checked by hand on every piece.

Trusted Service

A dedicated advisor for every client, full certificates, and lifetime aftercare.

Luxury Designs

Original designs and bespoke commissions — no two ZIAD pieces are quite the same.

Fair Pricing

Fair, direct pricing and transparent gold rates, with no inflated markups.
